faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Somers home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include sawdust-like wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, rustling sounds inside walls, and sightings of large black ants, especially in spring. Somers homes with wood siding or those near wooded areas are particularly susceptible. Our technicians provide free inspections to confirm carpenter ant activity and assess damage.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of carpenter ant control in Somers?
faqs.answer: Pricing between $350 and $2,000 depends on infestation size, number of colonies, accessibility of nesting sites, and property size. Larger Somers homes or those with multiple satellite colonies require more extensive treatment. We provide detailed estimates after inspection and offer warranties on our work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Somers residents in most cases. Carpenter ants cause structural damage over time, so prompt treatment is essential. Our team serves all Somers neighborhoods, from Route 202 corridor properties to homes near Reis Park, with flexible scheduling to meet your needs.

faqs.question: Are your carpenter ant treatments safe for families and pets in Somers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and targeted application methods that are safe for your household when applied properly. Our technicians are trained in the latest low-toxicity treatments and will provide specific safety instructions. We're committed to protecting both your family and Somers' natural environment while effectively eliminating carpenter ants.
